title: GJC config.yml
description: User and project settings for GJC. Generated from packages/coding-agent/src/config/settings-schema.ts.

terminalBell.description: Emit a BEL character for local terminal notifications. Windows Terminal may keep BEL silent depending on profile/system sound settings; use completion.notifyCommand for a PowerShell Console.Beep workaround.

bellOnComplete.description: Ring the terminal bell when an agent turn completes

bellOnApproval.description: Ring the terminal bell when a plan or approval prompt needs attention

bellOnAsk.description: Ring the terminal bell when an ask/user-input prompt needs attention

autoResume.description: Automatically resume the most recent session in the current directory

preventIdleSleep.description: caffeinate -i: keep the system awake while a session is open

preventSystemSleep.description: caffeinate -s: block all system sleep while on AC power

declareUserActive.description: caffeinate -u: keep the display lit and treat the user as active

preventDisplaySleep.description: caffeinate -d: keep the display from idle-sleeping while a session is open

default.description: Model profile applied automatically at startup

dark.description: Theme used when terminal has dark background

light.description: Theme used when terminal has light background

colorBlindMode.description: Use blue instead of green for diff additions

sessionAccent.description: Use the session name color for the editor border and status line gap

artifactSpillThreshold.description: Tool output above this size is saved as an artifact; tail is kept inline

artifactTailBytes.description: Amount of tail content kept inline when output spills to artifact

artifactHeadBytes.description: Amount of head content kept inline alongside the tail when output spills to artifact (middle elision). 0 disables — keep tail only.

outputMaxColumns.description: Per-line byte cap for streaming tool outputs (bash, ssh, python, js eval) and `read`. Lines wider than this are ellipsis-truncated; remaining bytes up to the next newline are dropped. 0 disables.

artifactTailLines.description: Maximum lines of tail content kept inline when output spills to artifact

intentTracing.description: Ask the agent to describe the intent of each tool call before executing it

maxTimeout.description: Maximum timeout in seconds the agent can set for any tool (0 = no limit)

discoveryMode.description: Hide non-essential built-in tools behind a search tool to save tokens.

essentialOverride.description: Override the always-loaded built-in tools (default: read, bash, edit). Leave empty to use defaults.

autoResize.description: Resize large images to 2000x2000 max for better model compatibility

blockImages.description: Prevent images from being sent to LLM providers

maxInlineImageColumns.description: Maximum width in terminal columns for inline images (default 100). Set to 0 for unlimited (bounded only by terminal width).

maxInlineImageRows.description: Maximum height in terminal rows for inline images (default 20). Set to 0 to use only the viewport-based limit (60% of terminal height).

hyperlinks.description: Wrap file paths in OSC 8 hyperlinks for terminal-native click-to-open (auto: detect support; off: never; always: unconditional)

showTokenUsage.description: Show per-turn token usage on assistant messages

showHardwareCursor.description: Show terminal cursor for IME support

clearOnShrink.description: Clear empty rows when content shrinks (may cause flicker)

hideThinkingBlock.description: Hide thinking blocks in assistant responses

repeatToolDescriptions.description: Render full tool descriptions in the system prompt instead of a tool name list

temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0 = deterministic, 1 = creative, -1 = provider default)

topK.description: Sample from top-K tokens (-1 = provider default)

presencePenalty.description: Penalty for introducing already-present tokens (-1 = provider default)

repetitionPenalty.description: Penalty for repeated tokens (-1 = provider default)

serviceTier.description: Processing priority hint (none = omit). OpenAI accepts the tier values directly; Anthropic realizes `priority` as `speed: "fast"` on supported Opus models. Scoped values target one family.
Service tier applied to task-tool subagents only. "inherit" copies the main session tier; any explicit value overrides it for subagents without touching the main session.

mode.description: Isolation backend for subagents. "auto" lets the native PAL pick the best available backend (CoW-aware filesystems, then overlayfs/ProjFS, then a git worktree / recursive-copy fallback).

merge.description: How isolated task changes are integrated (patch apply or branch merge)

commits.description: Commit message style for nested repo changes (generic or AI-generated)

eager.description: Encourage the agent to delegate work to subagents unless changes are trivial

simple.description: How much shared structure the task tool accepts (default, schema-free, or independent)

maxConcurrency.description: Safer concurrent limit for subagents; higher fan-out still requires an explicit plan above 4 tasks.

enableLsp.description: Allow subagents spawned via the task tool to use the lsp tool. Off by default to keep subagents cheap; enable when LSP-aware delegation is worth the extra tokens.

enabled.description: Allow explicitly opted-in subagents to start from a sanitized snapshot of parent context when both the agent and task item also opt in.

maxMessages.description: Maximum parent messages copied into an explicitly opted-in subagent fork-context seed.

maxTokens.description: Approximate token cap for explicit full fork-context seeds. 0 uses 15% of the target model context window, with a 15k fallback when the window is unknown.

maxRecursionDepth.description: How many levels deep subagents can spawn their own subagents

maxRuntimeMs.description: Hard wall-clock limit per subagent (ms). 0 disables it. Defense-in-depth against provider-side stream hangs that escape the inference-layer watchdog; triggers a normal subagent abort with a 'timed out' reason.

maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts on API errors

maxDelayMs.description: Maximum wait between retries, in ms. When the provider asks us to wait longer than this and no credential or model fallback succeeds, the request fails fast instead of sleeping (e.g. 3-hour Anthropic rate-limit windows).

requestMaxRetries.description: Maximum provider request retries before a stream is established. Counts retries, not the first attempt. Set to 0 to disable provider request retries.

streamMaxRetries.description: Maximum provider stream replay retries for replay-safe transient stream failures. Counts retries, not the first attempt. Set to 0 to disable provider stream retries.

fallbackRevertPolicy.description: When to return to the primary model after a fallback

steeringMode.description: How to process queued messages while agent is working

followUpMode.description: How to drain follow-up messages after a turn completes

interruptMode.description: When steering messages interrupt tool execution

busyPromptMode.description: What a submitted prompt does while the agent is busy: queue normal chat for the next turn, or steer to interrupt the active turn

doubleEscapeAction.description: Action when pressing Escape twice with empty editor

treeFilterMode.description: Default filter mode when opening the session tree

autocompleteMaxVisible.description: Max visible items in autocomplete dropdown (3-20)

emojiAutocomplete.description: Suggest emojis from `:name:` shortcodes and expand text emoticons like `:D` or `:-)`

quiet.description: Skip welcome screen and startup status messages

welcomeBannerMode.description: Logo style for the startup welcome screen

enabled.description: Show the interactive GitHub star reminder when gh is authenticated

notifyCommand.description: Optional user-level shell command to run when an agent turn completes; receives GJC_NOTIFICATION_* environment variables. On Windows, this can call PowerShell [Console]::Beep when terminal BEL is silent.

timeout.description: Auto-select recommended option after timeout (0 to disable)

notify.description: Notify when ask tool is waiting for input

enabled.description: Enable speech-to-text input via microphone

modelName.description: Whisper model size (larger = more accurate but slower)

enabled.description: Promote to a larger-context model on context overflow instead of compacting (off by default; opt in to enable)
Automatically compact context when it gets too large

strategy.description: Choose in-place context-full maintenance, auto-handoff, or disable auto maintenance (off)

thresholdPercent.description: Percent threshold for context maintenance; set to Default to use legacy reserve-based behavior

thresholdTokens.description: Fixed token limit for context maintenance; overrides percentage if set

handoffSaveToDisk.description: Save generated handoff documents to markdown files for the auto-handoff flow

remoteEnabled.description: Use remote compaction endpoints when available instead of local summarization

idleEnabled.description: Compact context while idle when token count exceeds threshold

idleThresholdTokens.description: Token count above which idle compaction triggers

idleTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds to wait while idle before compacting

enabled.description: Prompt to summarize when leaving a branch

backend.description: Off, local memory pipeline, or Hindsight remote memory

scoping.description: global = one shared bank; per-project = isolated bank per cwd; per-project-tagged = shared bank with project tags so global + project memories merge on recall

autoRecall.description: Recall memories on the first turn of each session

autoRetain.description: Retain transcript every N turns and at session boundaries

retainMode.description: full-session = upsert one document per session, last-turn = chunked

mentalModelsEnabled.description: Read curated reflect summaries (mental models) into developer instructions at boot. Loads existing models on the bank — does not write. Pair with hindsight.mentalModelAutoSeed to also auto-create the built-in seed set.

mentalModelAutoSeed.description: At session start, create any built-in mental models (project-conventions, project-decisions, user-preferences) that do not yet exist on the bank.

enabled.description: Time Traveling Stream Rules: interrupt agent when output matches patterns

contextMode.description: What to do with partial output when TTSR triggers

interruptMode.description: When to interrupt mid-stream vs inject warning after completion

repeatMode.description: How rules can repeat: once per session or after a message gap

repeatGap.description: Messages before a rule can trigger again

mode.description: Select the edit tool variant (replace, patch, hashline, vim, or apply_patch)

fuzzyMatch.description: Accept high-confidence fuzzy matches for whitespace differences

streamingAbort.description: Abort streaming edit tool calls when patch preview fails

hashlineAutoDropPureInsertDuplicates.description: Drop 2+ pure-insert payload lines that duplicate adjacent file context

blockAutoGenerated.description: Prevent editing of files that appear to be auto-generated (protoc, sqlc, swagger, etc.)

readLineNumbers.description: Prepend line numbers to read tool output by default

readHashLines.description: Include line hashes in read output for hashline edit mode (LINE+ID|content)

defaultLimit.description: Default number of lines returned when agent calls read without a limit

enabled.description: Return structural code summaries when read is called without an explicit selector

prose.description: Return structural summaries for Markdown and plain text reads

minBodyLines.description: Minimum multiline body or literal length before read summaries collapse it

minCommentLines.description: Minimum multiline block comment length before read summaries collapse it

toolResultPreview.description: Render read tool results inline in the transcript instead of summary rows

enabled.description: Enable the lsp tool for language server protocol

formatOnWrite.description: Automatically format code files using LSP after writing

diagnosticsOnWrite.description: Return LSP diagnostics after writing code files

diagnosticsOnEdit.description: Return LSP diagnostics after editing code files

enabled.description: Block shell commands that have dedicated tools

default.message: Use the `read` tool instead of cat/head/tail. It provides better context and handles binary files.
Use the `search` tool instead of grep/rg. It respects .gitignore and provides structured output.
Use the `find` tool instead of find/fd. It respects .gitignore and is faster for glob patterns.
Use the `edit` tool instead of sed -i. It provides diff preview and fuzzy matching.
Use the `edit` tool instead of perl -i. It provides diff preview and fuzzy matching.
Use the `edit` tool instead of awk -i inplace. It provides diff preview and fuzzy matching.
Use the `write` tool instead of echo/cat redirection. It handles encoding and provides confirmation.

stripTrailingHeadTail.description: Silently drop trailing `| head`/`| tail` pipes from single-line bash commands. Output is already truncated automatically.

enabled.description: Automatically background long-running bash commands and deliver the result later
Compress verbose shell output (git, npm, cargo, etc.) before returning it to the agent

py.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch to the IPython kernel

js.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch to the in-process JavaScript runtime

kernelMode.description: Whether to keep IPython kernel alive across calls

enabled.description: Enable the todo_write tool for task tracking

max.description: Maximum reminders to complete todos before giving up

eager.description: Automatically create a comprehensive todo list after the first message

enabled.description: Enable the find tool for file searching
Enable the search tool for content searching

contextBefore.description: Lines of context before each search match

contextAfter.description: Lines of context after each search match

enabled.description: Enable the ast_grep tool for structural AST search
Enable the ast_edit tool for structural AST rewrites
Enable agent-to-agent IRC messaging via the irc tool
Enable the render_mermaid tool for Mermaid-to-ASCII rendering
Enable the debug tool for DAP-based debugging
Enable the calculator tool for basic calculations
Enable the recipe tool when a justfile / package.json / Cargo.toml / Makefile / Taskfile is present
Enable the checkpoint and rewind tools for context checkpointing
Enable the skill tool so the agent can chain into another available skill on its next turn
Allow the read tool to fetch and process URLs

insaneFallback.description: Opt in to the vendored insane-search escalation for blocked public URL reads (403/WAF/JS-gated). Off by default. Requires preinstalled python3 + curl_cffi (and node + playwright/stealth for the browser phase); changes network posture by enabling TLS/browser impersonation for public pages.

enabled.description: Enable the github tool (op-based dispatch for repository, issue, pull request, diff, search, checkout, push, and Actions watch workflows)
Cache rendered issue/PR view output in ~/.gjc/cache/github-cache.db so repeated reads are free

softTtlSec.description: Within this window, cached issue/PR view rows are returned directly. Default 5 minutes.

hardTtlSec.description: Past soft TTL but within hard TTL, the tool returns the cached row and refreshes it in the background. Past hard TTL, the row is dropped. Default 7 days.

enabled.description: Enable the web_search tool for web searching

fallback.description: Ordered fallback web search providers after the active model native provider

timeout.description: Hard timeout in seconds for a single web search request (default 300)

enabled.description: Enable the browser tool (Ulixee Hero)

headless.description: Launch browser in headless mode (disable to show browser UI)

screenshotDir.description: Directory to save screenshots. If unset, screenshots go to a temp file. Supports ~. Examples: ~/Downloads, ~/Desktop, /sdcard/Download (Android)

enabled.description: Automatically reclaim idle, unheld GJC-managed headless/spawned browser tabs.

idleMs.description: Evict headless/spawned tabs idle longer than this many milliseconds.

rssLimitMb.description: Parent-process RSS (MB) above which idle tabs are opportunistically evicted LRU.

sweepIntervalMs.description: How often the resource GC sweeps browser tabs and stale screenshot directories.

enabled.description: Enable the macOS computer tool for this session. Off by default.

alwaysOn.description: Keep the macOS computer tool callable without per-session enablement.

autoScreenshot.description: Automatically request bounded screenshots after computer actions when supported.

screenshotMaxBytes.description: Maximum screenshot payload size for computer action results.

killSwitchHotkey.description: Native stop/suspend hotkey shown to users for computer-use sessions.

enabled.description: Persist audit records for enabled computer-use actions.
Delete stale computer-use screenshot fallback directories on disk.

staleMs.description: Remove screenshot fallback directories whose mtime is older than this many milliseconds.

scanIntervalMs.description: Minimum interval between os.tmpdir scans for stale screenshot directories.

enabled.description: Enable async bash commands and background task execution

pollWaitDuration.description: How long the poll tool waits for background job updates before returning the current state

enabled.description: Enable plan mode for read-only exploration and planning before execution
Enable per-session goal mode and the hidden goal tool

statusInFooter.description: Show goal usage alongside the goal indicator in the status line

continuationModes.description: Run modes where active goals may auto-continue between turns

todoClearDelay.description: How long to wait before removing completed/abandoned tasks from the list

enabled.description: Obfuscate secrets before sending to AI providers

kimiApiFormat.description: API format for Kimi Code provider

openaiWebsockets.description: Websocket policy for OpenAI Codex models (auto uses model defaults, on forces, off disables)

parallelFetch.description: Use Parallel extract API for URL fetching when credentials are available

appendOnlyContext.description: Cache system prompt + tool specs and keep an append-only message log so provider prefix caches (DeepSeek, Anthropic) hit at maximum rate. Auto enables for DeepSeek.

enabled.description: Master toggle for all Exa search tools

enableSearch.description: Basic search, deep search, code search, crawl
